message.content:
**Business Name**: Rishaad Baker's  
**Tagline**: Delicious Taste  

**Main Headline**: BEGINNER BAKING CLASS  
**Subheadline**: LEARN. BAKE. EARN!  

**Logo Description**: Circular green logo with a chef’s hat icon at the top, laurel wreath border, text "Rishaad Baker's" in gold, and "DELICIOUS TASTE" in smaller gold text below.  

**You Will Learn (Menu/Class Items)**:  
- Vanilla Cake  
- Chocolate Cake  
- Passion Cake  
- Lemon Cake  
- Strawberry Cake  
- Classic Red Velvet  
- Classic Black Forest  
- Cookies  
- Cup Cakes  
- Soft Icing & Hard Icing  
- Honey Comb  
- Final Cake Exam  

**Class Features**:  
- Hands-On Practicals  
- Beginner Friendly  
- Step-By-Step Guidance  
- Small Class Size  
- Recipes & Tips Included  

**Call to Action**: TURN YOUR PASSION INTO PROFIT!  

**Pricing & Duration**:  
- Price: 15,000  
- Duration: 6 WEEKS  

**Urgency**: LIMITED SLOTS! BOOK YOUR SPOT NOW!  

**Contact Info**:  
- For More Info: 0724 266 695 (WhatsApp icon included)  

**Note**: A NOTE: ALL STUDENTS CARRY THEIR BAKED PRODUCTS AT HOME, STUDENTS TO BUY THEIR TOOLS OWN TOOLS
